en-US.name: Lexi
en-US.description: Lexi routes your questions to a Groq LLM and can call tools like weather. Open Lexi and just talk.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Lexi what is the weather in Bangalore
Alexa, ask Lexi why the sky is blue

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'open Lexi' then ask a question. Requires GROQ_API_KEY set in the Lambda.
